title: ITALY enforcement action against Università Telematica e-Campus (50,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 50,000 on Università Telematica e-Campus. The controller used facial recognistion system to controll the attendance in online classes, but failed to base the processing on a sufficient legal basis.
